speaking_style: Unhurried. Uses old expressions. Comfortable with silence.
backstory_seeds: in town to sell goods at market and treating themselves before the road home
dealing with a land dispute or tax problem that brought them to town
looking for a farmhand who skipped out with tools or livestock
genuinely just passing through and grateful for a warm meal
worried about this year's harvest after a strange cold spell in spring that nobody can explain
has heard the lord intends to raise rents again and is deciding what can be done about it
lost half the household to the pestilence and is still working the same land alone
trying to arrange an apprenticeship or marriage for a son or daughter that requires town dealings
